sections.label: Verse 1
lines: Tatkhiatna thu ka tangko nuam hi, Tuuno si tawh hong tatkhiatna;
A bei theilo hong hehpihna hi,

sections.label: Chorus
lines: Tatkhiat, tatkhiat, Pasian ta cihna ka ngahta.

sections.label: Verse 2
lines: tatkhiatna, Kam a genzawh ding hilo hi;
Ama khuavak sungah ka om ta,

sections.label: Verse 3
lines: Ka lung sung om hong Tanpa itna,
Ke’n sasa nuam ing, Amah phatna,
Tua la mah ka sasa nuam hi.

sections.label: Verse 4
lines: Amah in kei hong kem tawntung ding,

sections.label: Verse 5
lines: Ka thei hi, kham lukhu ka ngah ding,
Ama mel bangin ka kicing ding,
Amah tawh ka teenkhop hun ciang.
